description: VERIFIED LIVE: 网易公开课 (NetEase Open Courses) via content-script DOM extraction — no login, no API key. Course links use the /newview/movie/ path with the course name as link text. Navigate the tab to open.163.com (home or a category) and call the tool. Tested live by Claude Code: 97 course links — name + url extracted correctly.

tools.name: open163_courses
tools.description: Course links on the current 网易公开课 page (home or a category). Navigate the tab there first. Returns each course's name and url (/newview/movie/…). VERIFIED (97 courses).
